value_metric: the first real A0 official adapter: State Council policy documents + national laws/regulations from gov.cn parsed into the A0 template (original title, 发文字号, issuing organ, TYPED dates with 成文 written kept distinct from 发布 published, effectiveness status, attachments), replayable across 2016/2020/2024/current with a recoverable historical cursor -- the concrete first step of replacing Board-3 news noise with A0 official original text

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: adapter + era fixtures; the live gov.cn parse ran from the dev environment (not the worker), so 0 cloud cost. Wiring this adapter into the worker cron (later) makes each fetch a Worker subrequest counted against the DIR-007 free tier with a per-run cap.

live_parse_smoke.note: cross-year written 2021 vs published 2022 -- exactly why date types must not be confused
